title: Challenge
description: Schema for handling challenge or step-up authentication actions and results (e.g., 3DS2).

callback_url.description: The URL where the result should be sent or where the interaction completes.

intent.description: The intent of the action. Well-known values: `device_data_collection`, `challenge`.

type.description: The mechanism for the action. Well-known values: `hidden_iframe`, `popup`.

url.description: The URL to load or post to.

request_data.description: Data to be sent with the request. For form posts (POST), this should be a flat set of key-value pairs where both keys and values are strings.

intent.description: The intent of the completed action.

response_data.description: Data returned from the interaction. For form posts, this is typically a flat set of key-value pairs where both keys and values are strings.
